description: Hyderabad is a vibrant blend of royal Nizami heritage and modern city vibes. Known as the City of Pearls, Hyderabad offers a perfect mix of history, culture, food and nightlife. From exploring the iconic Charminar and majestic Golconda Fort to strolling through Laad Bazaar and enjoying the lights of Hussain Sagar Lake — every corner of this city feels alive. The world-famous Hyderabadi biryani, grand palaces, ancient mosques, tech parks, shopping streets and modern entertainment zones make Hyderabad a memorable destination for travellers of all ages. It’s a city where tradition and technology live together — creating an unforgettable experience for every visitors.

faqs.title: 1) What is Hyderabad famous for?
faqs.content: Hyderabad is famous for Charminar, Golconda Fort, Pearls, Laad Bazaar and Hyderabadi Biryani.

faqs.title: 2) Best time to visit Hyderabad?
faqs.content: October to February — pleasant climate and ideal for sightseeing.

faqs.title: 3) Are major attractions included in the package?
faqs.content: It depends on the package type. Usually, Charminar, Golconda Fort, Hussain Sagar, Birla Mandir & Ramoji Film City can be covered.

faqs.title: 4) Is Ramoji Film City included?
faqs.content: Ramoji Film City entry is optional and can be added on request with extra charges.

faqs.title: 5) Which areas are best for shopping?
faqs.content: Laad Bazaar, Charminar area, Banjara Hills & Begum Bazaar are popular for pearls, bangles and handicrafts.
